NORRIS M. GOODWIN, JUDGE 10:00 AM CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT, IN PRO PER. DEFT NOT PRESENT. PLTF WITNESS, WILLIAM BENTON, SWORN & EXAMINED BY THE COURT. COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLTF AGAINST DEFT FOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 1800 BUSH ST, APT. 403, S.F. FOR THE SUM OF $2040.00 FOR BACK RENT AND COSTS PER COST BILL. WRIT OF POSSESSION TO ISSEUE FORTHWITH AND THERE SHALL BE NO STAY OF EXECUTION. RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELLED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JENSEN, ANITA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENSEN, ANITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1080 BUSH ST, APT. 403, S.F. CA 94109 $2,040.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,040.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. WRIT OF POSSESSION TO ISSUE FORTHWITH AND NO STAY OF EXECUTION.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
